diagnoses.name: Nonruptured cerebral aneurysm
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient presented to our institution following detection of a nonruptured cerebral aneurysm on imaging studies.

diagnoses.name: Essential (primary) hypertension
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient with a significant past medical history including essential hypertension

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient with a significant past medical history including essential hypertension, hyperlipidemia

diagnoses.name: Prior malignant neoplasm of the breast
diagnoses.evidence_span: patient with a significant past medical history including essential hypertension, hyperlipidemia, and prior malignant neoplasm of the breast

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ or structure
diagnoses.evidence_span: the patient developed a postprocedural hemorrhage of a circulatory system organ following the endovascular intervention

diagnoses.name: Accidental puncture and laceration of a circulatory system organ or structure during procedure
diagnoses.evidence_span: with an associated accidental puncture and laceration of a circulatory structure that occurred during the procedure

diagnoses.name: Hemothorax
diagnoses.evidence_span: These complications led to development of hemothorax requiring close monitoring and management.

diagnoses.name: Acute posthemorrhagic anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: The hemorrhage resulted in acute posthemorrhagic anemia necessitating transfusion support.

diagnoses.name: Cerebral edema
diagnoses.evidence_span: the pt developed significant cerebral edema in the immediate postoperative period

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural hypotension
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also experienced postprocedural hypotension requiring vasopressor and antihypertensive agent titration.

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural heart failure following surgical intervention
diagnoses.evidence_span: the pt developed postprocedural heart failure following the surgical intervention

diagnoses.name: Acute diastolic (congestive) heart failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: compounded by preexisting acute diastolic congestive heart failure

diagnoses.name: Aphasia related to cerebrovascular event
diagnoses.evidence_span: Speech evaluation revealed aphasia related to the cerebrovascular event and swelling.

diagnoses.name: Chest pain
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also complained of chest pain during hospitalization, which was appropriately evaluated.

diagnoses.name: Hypokalemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Electrolyte disturbances, particularly hypokalemia and hypomagnesemia, were identified and corrected

diagnoses.name: Hypomagnesemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Electrolyte disturbances, particularly hypokalemia and hypomagnesemia, were identified and corrected

procedures.name: Restriction of left internal carotid artery with intraluminal device via percutaneous approach
procedures.evidence_span: the pt underwent percutaneous restriction of the left internal carotid artery and intracranial artery using intraluminal devices

procedures.name: Restriction of intracranial artery with intraluminal device via percutaneous approach
procedures.evidence_span: the pt underwent percutaneous restriction of the left internal carotid artery and intracranial artery using intraluminal devices

medications.name: Furosemide
medications.frequency: daily (or as needed for volume status)
medications.evidence_span: Furosemide 10 mg IV daily (or as needed for volume status)

medications.name: Dexamethasone
medications.evidence_span: Dexamethasone 2 mg PO daily (taper per neurosurgery recommendations)

medications.name: Bisacodyl
medications.evidence_span: Bisacodyl 10 mg PO at bedtime as needed

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 325-650 mg PO Q6H as needed for pain

medications.name: Potassium chloride
medications.evidence_span: Potassium chloride 40 mEq PO daily (recheck K+ in 3-5 days)

medications.name: Magnesium sulfate
medications.evidence_span: Magnesium sulfate supplementation as directed by primary team

chief_complaint: Nonruptured cerebral aneurysm requiring interventional neuroradiology procedures
